name: seam_drawn_chain_wellformed_and_absent_chain_refused
note: 3.0.0 Change Two: a seam that DRAWS a chain of adjacent-stratum steps spanning its endpoints is well-formed; a seam carrying a chain but mechanism_status 'absent' is refused as contradictory_seam (a drawn mechanism is not absent), both by local semantics and by seam well-formedness.
